writing_guidelines.main_body_strategy: Clear and concise. Focus on novelty and experimental rigor.
writing_guidelines.figure_strategy: Use vector graphics. Ensure legibility in two-column layout.
writing_guidelines.table_strategy: Booktabs style. Bold best values. Report confidence intervals.
writing_guidelines.proof_strategy: Sketch in main body, full proofs in appendix.

common_pitfalls: Not using the official ICML style file
Forgetting to include reproducibility details in appendix
